description: Deep learning framework for tensor computation and neural networks with dynamic computational graphs
key_patterns: JIT compilation - TorchScript for graph optimization
dispatch system - operator routing via DispatchKey

subsystems.name: Tensor Core
subsystems.description: Low-level tensor implementation, storage, device abstraction, scalar types

subsystems.name: ATen (A Tensor Library)
subsystems.description: Core tensor operations, kernels, dispatch mechanism, CPU/CUDA implementations

subsystems.name: Neural Network Modules
subsystems.description: Layer implementations (Conv, Linear, RNN, Transformer), loss functions, functional API

subsystems.name: Autograd Engine
subsystems.description: Automatic differentiation, gradient computation, computation graph management

subsystems.name: Optimizers
subsystems.description: SGD, Adam, AdamW, LBFGS, learning rate schedulers

subsystems.name: Distributed Training
subsystems.description: DDP, FSDP, RPC, collective operations, device mesh

subsystems.name: CUDA Backend
subsystems.description: CUDA tensor operations, memory management, streams, cuBLAS/cuDNN integration

subsystems.name: TorchScript (JIT)
subsystems.description: Script compilation, tracing, graph optimization, serialization

subsystems.name: FX Graph Mode
subsystems.description: Symbolic tracing, graph transformations, pattern matching

subsystems.name: TorchDynamo
subsystems.description: Python bytecode analysis, graph capture for torch.compile

subsystems.name: TorchInductor
subsystems.description: Compiler backend, Triton codegen, kernel fusion, scheduling

subsystems.name: Export
subsystems.description: Model export, graph signature, unflatten, deployment utilities

subsystems.name: Quantization
subsystems.description: Post-training quantization, QAT, FX-based quantization

subsystems.name: Code Generation
subsystems.description: Native function generation, operator schemas, YAML-based code templates

subsystems.name: Functorch
subsystems.description: Composable function transforms: vmap, grad, jacrev, jacfwd

subsystems.name: C++ Frontend
subsystems.description: Python bindings, C++ API, libtorch extensions

subsystems.name: Data Loading
subsystems.description: Dataset, DataLoader, samplers, multiprocessing workers

subsystems.name: Profiler
subsystems.description: Performance profiling, CUDA events, TensorBoard integration

subsystems.name: ONNX Export
subsystems.description: ONNX model export, operator conversion, symbolic functions

subsystems.name: MPS Backend
subsystems.description: Metal Performance Shaders for Apple Silicon GPU acceleration

architecture_notes.dispatch_system: Operators route through c10 dispatcher based on DispatchKey (CPU, CUDA, Autograd, etc.)
architecture_notes.tensor_storage: Tensors wrap TensorImpl which owns Storage for actual data
architecture_notes.autograd_graph: Forward pass builds DAG of grad_fn nodes; backward traverses in reverse
architecture_notes.jit_vs_eager: Eager mode executes operations immediately; JIT captures graphs for optimization
architecture_notes.memory_management: Caching allocator pools GPU memory; automatic garbage collection
architecture_notes.extension_points: Custom operators via torch.library, custom backends via torch.backends
